jd_analysis_result.summary: Sublime Nurses is seeking undergraduate nursing students in their second year to work casually in hospitals in the Northern Suburbs of Sydney. The role offers flexibility and the opportunity to gain valuable experience in various hospital settings.

skill_evidence.passion: If you are passionate about providing exceptional care for the patients and making a difference in their lives, we'd like to hear from you.
skill_evidence.acute care: 2nd year Bachelor of Nursing Student with 80+hours in acute clinical placements OR Hold certificate of HSA in Acute Care with an acute care placement or paid experience.
skill_evidence.police check: Police Check (or be willing to obtain)
skill_evidence.communication: We offer excellent communication and a tailor-made service to our nurses.
skill_evidence.full immunisation record: Full immunisation Record including current Flu and COVID Vaccinations
skill_evidence.working with children check: Working with Children Check (or be willing to obtain)

responsibilities: work on a casual basis in hospitals
use your skill set across various hospital settings
provide exceptional care for the patients
